name: Sugarcane
tagline: A family-owned Kaimuki boutique with vintage beach cottage vibes — local jewelry, island decor, and gifts you won't find in Waikiki.
parking: Street parking on 11th Ave (beneath Himalayan Kitchen)
talkStory: Tucked on 11th Ave in Kaimuki — not on the main Waialae Ave drag — Sugarcane is the kind of shop you'd miss if you weren't looking. The family-owned boutique specializes in locally crafted home decor, beachy accessories, vintage dishware, and jewelry from Oahu-based designers. The vibe is vintage beach cottage, curated but not pretentious. Owner Kennedy Kramlick continued the legacy her mom started nearly 15 years ago. Shopping here means supporting actual island makers, not the mass-produced 'aloha' merch that fills Waikiki gift shops.
